creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

As far as I can tell, there are no issues with svn0.eu.freebsd.org and IPv6.  Can you give more details please?  Which protocol are you trying to use (svn? http? https?)  Can you ping6 it?  If not, can you show the results of a traceroute6 to it please?

Thanks,

Gavin
